Off Calendar Jan-03-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendants To Produce Their Person(S) Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And Pay Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-16-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Ryan Opgenorth, Esq. (415.433.8000; ropgenorth@pillsburycoleman.com) of Pillsbury & Coleman, LLP for Plaintiff.
Daniel Sakaguchi, Esq. (415.623.7000; dsakaguchi@vlmglaw.com) of Varela, Lee, Metz & Guarino, LLP for Defendants.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF BARBARA FOLGER's Motion To Compel Defendants To Produce Their Person(S) Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And Pay Sanctions:
The motion to compel is granted. Defendant State National Insurance Company, Inc., shall produce a PMK on Topic 4. Parties to meet and confer to agree by 12/20/2021 on PMK deposition date to be completed by 12/31/2021. Sanctions to remain under court jurisdiction for parties to notify Judge Pro Tem via email at bruce.highman@highmanlaw.com on status of deposition no later than 3 days after the deposition.

order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Bruce Highman, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-10-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Ryan H. Opgenorth, Esq. (415.433.8000; ropgenorth@pillsburycoleman.com) of Pillsbury & Coleman LLP for Plaintiff.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS STATE NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY, INC., REDPOINT RESOLUTIONS, LLC, and UNIVOPS INSURANCE SERVICES, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied.

see word minute for details.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
